QUICK LINKS Grievance Redressal Committee Anti Ragging Committee Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (IT) 0 LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 0 + RECRUITERS 0 + PUBLICATIONS 0 + PATENTS 51LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 75+ PUBLICATIONS 25+ PATENTS PROGRAM SCOPE Over the last 25-30 years, we have witnessed extraordinary developments in the field of information technology

. These developments have changed the way live and have opened several avenues of opportunities for young engineers. Information has become a powerful tool to run organizations efficiently and effectively and hence enormous investment is made by organizations in information technology which has enhanced the overall scope of this field. LEARNING SCOPE In the B. Tech IT program at Sri Eshwar, through strong association with IT companies, technically competent faculty with rich academic experience and lab infrastructure on par with the IT companies

. Students are provided with a holistic learning environment in modern and futuristic IT technologies including AI-ML, Data Integration, Big data, DevOps, Blockchain, Advanced Java Technologies, User Experience Design, Data Science and topics such as Software Engineering and Database Management Systems. CAREER PROGRESSION The students studying B.Tech IT have abundant and unlimited opportunities with leading multinational IT companies recruiting fresh IT graduates in large numbers as Graphic Designers, Multimedia developers, Software Developers, AI Engineers or becoming an entrepreneur, developing their own software products or purse higher studies

. VISION To groom students into globally competent IT professionals and meet the ever changing requirements of the industry MISSION Develop the curriculum and deliver with strong fundamentals with creative thinking Empower the faculty to be highly qualified and competent Build strong connectivity with various stakeholders to enrich the knowledge Create technical solutions to the societal problems Develop and upgrade the facilities for the efficient execution of academic and research activities PROGRAM DETAILS Program Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will take up careers in Software Development and Testing and Involve in IT service and support management PEO2: Graduates will engage in a post graduate program in the field of Information Technology and Management science leading to
support management PEO2: Graduates will engage in a post graduate program in the field of Information Technology and Management science leading to academic and research careers

. PEO3: Graduates will take up Entrepreneurship as a career. Program Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required

. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment

. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences

. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Program Specific Outcomes PSO1: Demonstrate the ability to apply knowledge and skills in the development and deployment of software projects. PSO2: Create innovative solutions by leveraging emerging technologies to effectively manage IT infrastructure

. PSO2: Create innovative solutions by leveraging emerging technologies to effectively manage IT infrastructure. Dr.V.Saranya B.Tech., M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 13.10.2023 Areas of Specialization Network Security, Blockchain Technology, AI, Deep Learning, Mobile Networks Dr.Saranya V has been lecturing engineering graduates since 2011. She completed B.Tech UG degree in the year 2009 and M.E. PG degree in the year 2011. She was awarded a Doctorate of Philosophy (Ph.D.) by Anna University in the year 2019 and recognised as research supervisor by Centre for Research, Anna University and guiding 6 scholars.. She has been awarded “Best Paper Publication” in 2018.. She published 14 research articles, 2 books, 1 patent. She has reviewed an ample number of papers at IGI Global, Springer as reviewer. She is an active member of professional bodies like ISTE, IAENG, MISTE, IACSIT, and IRED. Dr.T

. She is an active member of professional bodies like ISTE, IAENG, MISTE, IACSIT, and IRED. Dr.T. Jayapratha B.Tech., M.E., Ph.D. D.O.J : 20.06.2011 Areas of Specialization Wireless Communication, Web Technologies Dr. T. Jayapratha holds a B.Tech degree in Information Technology , M.E degree in Computer Science and Engineerin and Ph.D. at Anna University. With a distinguished portfolio, she has published 10 high-impact research papers, authored a book chapter, and holds 8 patents. A certified expert in Full-Stack Web Development, she has successfully mentored student teams to win awards in hackathons and project design competitions. Her dedication and contributions have been recognized with several institutional accolades, including “Best Mentor,” “Best Researcher,” and “Best Brander.” Ms

. Jayapratha plays a crucial role in the development and maintenance of the institutional website and has guided students in designing websites for various in-house events, further showcasing her technical expertise. Dr.P.KALPANA B.E.,M.E.,Ph.D D.O.J : 06.06.2025 Areas of Specialization AI,Machine learning, Web Technologies, Cloud computing Dr. P. Kalpana holds undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degrees in Computer Science and Engineering. She is a University Rank Holder and a Gold Medalist in both her UG and PG programs. She is a certified Oracle trainer, a Wipro-certified faculty member in Java Full Stack Development, and an AWS-certified trainer. Under her mentorship, her team emerged as the winners of the Smart India Hackathon in both 2023 and 2024

. Under her mentorship, her team emerged as the winners of the Smart India Hackathon in both 2023 and 2024. In addition to these achievements, she has guided numerous students in various hackathons, many of whom have secured prestigious awards. In recognition of her contributions, she received an appreciation award from the Forest Department for her involvement in Project Elephant. She was also honored as the Best Faculty of 2022 by Sri Krishna College of Technology. She has published over 21 research articles in reputed national and international journals and conferences. Furthermore, she received a grant from La Fondation Dassault Systèmes to implement an innovative project, showcasing her commitment to academic excellence and research innovation. Dr.D.Saranya B.Tech., M.Tech., PhD

. Dr.D.Saranya B.Tech., M.Tech., PhD. D.O.J : 26.08.2021 Areas of Specialization Data structures and Algorithms ,Machine Learning,Data science Earned a B. Tech degree in the year 2009. Received an M.Tech degree from Anna university Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, in 2011. Recieved PhD in Information and Communication Engineering, Anna University, Chennai in the year 2026. She has published 6 papers, 2 Books and 1 patent.. . She has published 1 book, 2 patents,1 Book Chapter,,8 papers in refereed international journals and conferences. Mr.C.Vasanthakumar M.E.,(Ph.D). D.O.J : 01.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Cyber Security, Cloud Computing, & Software Testing He graduated with a B.E. (UG) degree in 2007, followed by an M.E. (PG) degree in 2011. Currently pursuing a Ph.D. at Anna University. He is a Wipro-certified faculty member in Cloud Computing and .NET Full Stack. He has completed one month of industrial training in Cyber Security at Saptang Lab, Chennai. An active member of IETE, IAENG, and IGEN, he has published 7 research papers, 8 patents, and authored 1 book. He was awarded the “Best Mentor of the Department for High-Level Competitions” in 2023. . He was awarded the “Best Mentor of the Department for High-Level Competitions” in 2023. Ms. Minu Balakrishnan M.E, (Ph.D) D.O.J : 01.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Vehicular ad hoc Networks, Cognitive Radio networks, Machine learning She graduated with a B.Tech UG degree in the year 2012, followed by an M.E PG degree in the year 2017. Currently pursuing a PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, she has demonstrated a prolific research output with over 13 papers published, 25 book chapters, 1 Book and 4 patents. When she was working in the Kerala state IT mission, She was recognized and received an appreciation award from the Revenue Minister of Kerala for her outstanding service in implementing the e-District Project in the District within a limited period

. Mr.U.Prakash B.Tech., M.E.,(Ph.D) D.O.J : 18.07.2022 Areas of Specialization Networks, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning Mr.U.Prakash is currently pursuing PhD at Anna University. He completed his B.Tech – UG degree in the year 2006 and M.E- PG degree in the year 2013 .He is a CCNA certified in CISCO and a Infosys Certified Campus Connect program Trainer.. He has published 8 papers and 2 patents. He attended a 2 week industrial training program with Pine Sphere solutions on Full Stack, Django. Mr.V.Viswanathan B.Tech., M.E. D.O.J : 24.07.2023 Areas of Specialization Computer Networks, Cyber Security, Blockchain Technology Mr.V.Viswanathan received his B.Tech Degree in computer science and engineering from National Institute of Technology, Trichy, India, in 2004

. He graduated with an M.E. in computer science engineering from Anna University in Chennai, India, in 2007. Additionally, he obtained his international certifications in RHCE, MCSE, MCSA, and CCNP. He has published 5 papers and 2 patents. He is skilled in the administration and design of IT infrastructure. He has HR, AAA, and API Audit experience at the institute level. He received seed money of Rs.3.25L for the research projects in Blockchain Technology

. He received seed money of Rs.3.25L for the research projects in Blockchain Technology. Mr.G.Swaminathan B.Tech,M.Tech,(Ph.D) D.O.J : 12.06.2024 Areas of Specialization DBMS,Cloud Computing,Data Analytics Mr.G.Swaminathan received B.Tech,- UG degree from SASTRA in the year 2006,M.Tech – PG degree in the year 2013 ,He is Oracle Certified Professional (OCP), RedHat certified System Administrator (RHCSA) and VSphere 6.0 He had very vast industry experience in the field of Software development. Mr.N.Anand M.E Areas of Specialization Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, Cloud Computing Mr. Anand Nagaraj is an academician and IT professional with 15+ years of experience, including 10+ years in engineering education and 5 years in the software industry as a Front-End Web Developer

. He is a Microsoft Certified Power BI Data Analyst (PL-300), Life Member of IAENG and ISTE, and has presented research papers at national and international conferences. He regularly participates in Faculty Development Programmes (FDPs) to stay abreast of emerging technologies

. He regularly participates in Faculty Development Programmes (FDPs) to stay abreast of emerging technologies. His areas of interest include Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, Cloud Computing, Web Technologies, and Blockchain, with a strong commitment to quality teaching, research, and industry-oriented learning Mr.R.P.Vijai Ganesh M.E D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Java Full Stack, Python, AWS, Power BI, and Selenium He is a Corporate Trainer and Software Professional with over 13+ years of experience in IT training, software development, and quality engineering, specializing in Java Full Stack, Python, AWS, Power BI, and Selenium

. He is currently serving as Team Lead (2024–Present) at AtomLabs , where he designs cloud frameworks and mentors teams in quality engineering practices. Previously, he worked as a Skill Development Engineer (2022–2024) at iamneo , delivering technical training and developing learning solutions; as a Software Trainer (2013–2022) at MCET , conducting software training and knowledge transfer programs; and as a Software Engineer (2011–2013) at Accenture , contributing to product development, software testing, and application support. He is passionate about emerging technologies and committed to delivering impactful training and innovative IT solutions.
